glosses.ja: こする; こすって洗う

sentences.target: Je frotte la tache sur le canapé.
sentences.reading: /ʒə fʁɔt la taʃ syʁ lə kanape/

translations.fr: Je frotte la tache sur le canapé.
translations.ipa: /ʒə fʁɔt la taʃ syʁ lə kanape/
translations.en: I'm rubbing the stain on the couch.
translations.es: Estoy frotando la mancha del sofá.
translations.de: Ich reibe den Fleck auf dem Sofa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在擦沙发上的污渍。
translations.yue: 我喺度擦梳化上面嘅污漬。
translations.pt: Estou esfregando a mancha no sofá.
translations.he: אני משפשף את הכתם על הספה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chà vết bẩn trên ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Ik wrijf de vlek op de bank.
translations.hi: मैं सोफ़े पर दाग रगड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: ソファのシミをこすっています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with ‘Je’.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘frotte’.
Preposition indicating spatial relation.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the object of the preposition.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Tu frottes tes mains pour les réchauffer.
sentences.reading: /ty fʁɔt te mɛ̃ puʁ le ʁeʃofe/

translations.fr: Tu frottes tes mains pour les réchauffer.
translations.ipa: /ty fʁɔt te mɛ̃ puʁ le ʁeʃofe/
translations.en: You rub your hands to warm them up.
translations.es: Te frotas las manos para calentarlas.
translations.de: Du reibst dir die Hände, um sie zu wärmen.
translations.it: Ti strofini le mani per scaldarle.
translations.ru: Ты растираешь руки, чтобы согреть их.
translations.pt: Você esfrega as mãos para aquecê-las.
translations.he: אתה משפשף את הידיים כדי לחמם אותן.
translations.vi: Bạn xoa tay để làm ấm.
translations.nl: Je wrijft je handen om ze warm te krijgen.
translations.uk: Ти треш руки, щоб їх зігріти.
translations.hu: Dörzsölöd a kezed, hogy felmelegítsd őket.
translations.hi: तुम हाथों को गर्म करने के लिए रगड़ते हो.
translations.el: Τρίβεις τα χέρια σου για να τα ζεστάνεις.
translations.nb: Du gnir hendene for å varme dem.
translations.sv: Du gnuggar händerna för att värma dem.
translations.ro: Îți freci mâinile ca să le încălzești.
translations.cs: Třeš si ruce, aby se zahřály.
translations.da: Du gnider dine hænder for at varme dem.
translations.ja: 手をこすって温めます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with ‘Tu’.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, plural form modifying ‘mains’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘frottes’.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a purpose infinitival clause.
Clitic direct-object pronoun, 3rd person plural, referring to ‘mains’, placed before the infinitive.
Infinitive verb expressing purpose; complement of ‘pour’ with object clitic ‘les’.

sentences.target: On frotte la casserole avec une éponge.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fʁɔt la kasʁɔl avɛk yn epɔ̃ʒ/

translations.fr: On frotte la casserole avec une éponge.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fʁɔt la kasʁɔl avɛk yn epɔ̃ʒ/
translations.en: We're scrubbing the saucepan with a sponge.
translations.es: Estamos fregando la cacerola con una esponja.
translations.de: Wir schrubben den Topf mit einem Schwamm.
translations.it: Stiamo strofinando la casseruola con una spugna.
translations.pt: Estamos esfregando a panela com uma esponja.
translations.he: אנחנו מקרצפים את הסיר עם ספוג.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chà cái nồi bằng miếng bọt biển.
translations.nl: We schrobben de pan met een spons.
translations.hi: हम स्पंज से पतीला रगड़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τρίβουμε την κατσαρόλα με ένα σφουγγάρι.
translations.nb: Vi skurer kasserollen med en svamp.
translations.sv: Vi skrubbar kastrullen med en svamp.
translations.da: Vi skrubber gryden med en svamp.
translations.ja: スポンジで鍋をこすっています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (‘one’/‘we’), 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘frotte’.
Preposition introducing the instrumental phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘éponge’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Nous aimons frotter le sol le samedi.
sentences.reading: /nu zɛmɔ̃ fʁɔte lə sɔl lə samdi/

translations.fr: Nous aimons frotter le sol le samedi.
translations.ipa: /nu zɛmɔ̃ fʁɔte lə sɔl lə samdi/
translations.en: We like to scrub the floor on Saturdays.
translations.es: Nos gusta fregar el suelo los sábados.
translations.de: Wir schrubben samstags gern den Boden.
translations.it: Ci piace strofinare il pavimento il sabato.
translations.ko: 우리는 토요일마다 바닥을 문지르는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们喜欢在周六擦地板。
translations.yue: 我哋鍾意喺星期六刷地板。
translations.ru: Нам нравится драить пол по субботам.
translations.pt: Gostamos de esfregar o chão aos sábados.
translations.he: אנחנו אוהבים לקרצף את הרצפה בשבתות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thích chà sàn vào các ngày thứ Bảy.
translations.ar: نحن نحب دعك الأرض أيام السبت.
translations.nl: We schrobben graag de vloer op zaterdagen.
translations.uk: Нам подобається терти підлогу по суботах.
translations.hi: हम शनिवार को फ़र्श रगड़ना पसंद करते हैं.
translations.el: Μας αρέσει να τρίβουμε το πάτωμα τα Σάββατα.
translations.nb: Vi liker å skrubbe gulvet på lørdager.
translations.id: Kami suka menyikat lantai pada hari Sabtu.
translations.sv: Vi gillar att skura golvet på lördagar.
translations.ro: Ne place să frecăm podeaua sâmbăta.
translations.da: Vi kan godt lide at skure gulvet om lørdagen.
translations.ja: 私たちは土曜日に床をこするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with ‘Nous’.
Infinitive verb; direct complement (object) of ‘aimons’.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘sol’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive ‘frotter’.
Definite article introducing a temporal noun.
Common temporal noun; complements the time expression ‘le samedi’ (‘on Saturdays’).
